intended_use: The Cardiac CT Function Software Application is intended for qualitative and quantitative evaluation of cardiovascular CT images in a DICOM Standard format, to calculate and display cardiac function m
intended_use_full: The Cardiac CT Function Software Application is intended for qualitative and quantitative evaluation of cardiovascular CT images in a DICOM Standard format, to calculate and display cardiac function metrics (e.g. end diastolic volume, end systolic volume, stroke volume, ejection fraction, cardiac output, cardiac index, and LV myocardial mass).
ground_truth: Reference standard established from three expert readers
other_metrics: Left Ventricle cavity: Mean Absolute Error <10%, Dice coefficient >86%, Hausdorff Distance <9.5 mm, Ejection Fraction bias 1.3% (95% CI [-12, 14]); Right Ventricle cavity: Mean Absolute Error <18%, Dice coefficient >85%, Hausdorff Distance <18 mm, Ejection Fraction bias -5.5% (95% CI [-15, 4.4]); Left Ventricle myocardium: Mean Absolute Error <17%, Dice coefficient >82%, Hausdorff Distance <15 mm
